headline: Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) Anticipates Q3 Revenue Above Estimates
summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) is one of the 10 Best Performing Quantum Computing Stocks So Far in 2026. On May 20, Reuters reported that Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) forecast Q3 revenue above estimates, showing growing artificial intelligence infrastructure demand. The company guided to roughly $3.9 billion, plus or minus $100 million, above LSEG predictions of […]
